name: Chocolate Death Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Unsweetened baking chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9x13-inch pan. Set aside.
2. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
3. Beat butter and sugar together in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Blend in the eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla extract and melted chocolate.
5. Add the dry ingredients alternately with the sour cream, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the boiling water. The batter will be thin.
7. Pour half of the batter into the prepared cake pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes until firm to the touch.
9. Meanwhile, prepare the filling by melting butter, caramels, and sweetened condensed milk together in a saucepan over low heat, stirring often.
10. Once melted, pour the mixture over the half-baked cake.
11. Pour the remaining cake batter over the caramel mixture.
12. Return to oven and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes or until firm to the touch.
13. Cool and frost, or serve with whipped cream or a la mode.
